productDisplayName: Baggit Women Humtum Taj Beige Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish three fold wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap.Dimensions: 14 cm x 11 cmCreated from genuine leatheretteA flap over the main flap with a magnetic closure, securing a pocketMain flap has two press buttons to secure the three foldsSide pocketTwo card holder slots and two pockets on the left foldOne pocket and one slot with a photo id holder on the centre foldA zippered pocket at the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
